name: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust 6.3% Series F Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Shares of Beneficial Interest
summary: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust 6.3% Series F Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Shares of Beneficial Interest represents a preferred equity ownership in Pebblebrook Hotel Trust. Preferred stockholders receive a fixed dividend payment and have priority over common stockholders in the event of liquidation. Pebblebrook Hotel Trust is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that invests in upscale hotels.
